name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Audit Log Contract
purpose: Plan future append-only audit events for approval, publish, rollback, and lifecycle operations.
retention_policy_notes: Audit events should be retained longer than preview/candidate artifacts.
Audit rows should be immutable and append-only.
Corrections should be represented as new events, not updates.
actor_requirements: Every event must have an actor or system actor.
Approval decisions must record the deciding user.
Future self-approval rules must be explicit policy, not implicit behavior.
checksum_requirements: Approval and publish events must record definition checksum.
Approval and publish events should record candidate snapshot checksum.
source_of_truth_notes: Audit logs are evidence and traceability records.
Audit logs are not source of truth for generated runtime code.
Generated runtime files and publish manifests become runtime truth only after future publish exists.
